blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,373 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
